human_review_items.summary: Bundled-input twin drift persists: task.json.inputs[].url serves the single file inputs/tokyo_places.parquet while reference/solution/generate.py, reference/failures/_make_brokens.py, and README.md target the Hive-bucketed inputs/tokyo_places/**/*.parquet. README failure-mode #1 (single-partition read) remains unreachable as a partition failure. Either revert the agent URL to the bucketed dir (prompt-change, version bump) or drop the bucketed copy and retarget generate.py/_make_brokens.py at the single file (touches inputs/ + reference/failures/ - not unilateral; human must bump version). Carried forward from the 2026-06-06 block's HR-001.

task.json.tags.quality_issues = ['non_latin_script'] (CJK round-tripping, checked by cjk_names_preserved) has no matching slug under coverage-vocabulary.yaml > data_quality_issues; the thesis <data-quality-table> has no such row, so the gap is not additively fixable by the evaluator. coverage.yaml keeps data_quality_issues empty with a free-text note. Carried forward from the 2026-06-06 block's HR-002.
